# React Portfolio App with Shadcn UI

This is a portfolio web application built with React, featuring:
- React Router DOM for navigation
- Shadcn/ui for themed components
- Custom navbar with theme support
- Responsive design

## Setup Instructions

- Install dependencies with `npm install`
- Run dev server with `npm run dev`
- Build for production with `npm run build`

## Development Guidelines

- Use Shadcn/ui components for UI consistency
- Create page components in `/src/pages/`
- Store reusable components in `/src/components/`
- Keep routing logic in `/src/App.tsx`
- Follow React best practices and hooks
